name: Chili Oil
recipeIngredient: 2 fresh red finger chili peppers, chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In stir-fries, mix 1 part Chili Oil with every 3 parts of the peanut oil or vegetable oil usually used.
2. For Szechwan chicken and fish dishes that call for a sprinkle of sesame oil at the end, try mixing 2 parts sesame oil with 1 part Chili Oil.
